outcome_contract.why: Free cells between close bookings look identical to genuinely free nights, hiding scheduling inefficiencies that staff need to act on.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Short gaps (1–3 consecutive free days between bookings) are visually distinguished on the grid, giving staff an immediate visual cue to investigate or reassign.

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No gap swatch; no amber token for warning-bg confirmed; need to verify token exists or use inline hsl
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Confirm colour token; add legend entry

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Free cells show transparent; booking cells show coloured; no gap state exists
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Staff cannot identify short gaps without manual scanning
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Define gap state clearly; ensure empty-state (no gaps in window) gracefully unchanged

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Internal tool; no auth changes; no PII exposure in gap status
No logging required for a visual-only derived status
`useGridData.test.ts` has good hook unit coverage; `packBookingsIntoRows` tested
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Write gap detection unit tests (TC-01 through TC-05)

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Adding `"gap"` requires simultaneous update to both `MyLocalStatus` and `statusColors` — must be atomic
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Atomic change; verify `TBookingPeriod` shape for synthetic gap periods

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `allRoomData` is a `useMemo`; gap detection adds O(n×d) pass (periods × dates in range)
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: For typical short grids (14-30 days, <10 rooms, <5 beds/room), O(n×d) is trivial
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Note in plan; no concern for typical window sizes

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Pure UI change; no schema/DB/API changes
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Rolling back is deleting the `"gap"` member + colour + detection code
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Additive-only change simplifies rollback; TypeScript error-safety prevents partial deploy

stage_payload.scope_summary: On the `/rooms-grid` page, free days that fall between two booking periods with only 1–3 days of gap look identical to any other free cell. Staff must scan manually to find these scheduling hazards. This change adds a `"gap"` pseudo-status so those cells render in a distinct amber/warning colour.
goals: Visually distinguish 1–3 consecutive free days sandwiched between two bookings for the same room/row
Integrate cleanly into the existing `MyLocalStatus` → `statusColors` → `RowCell` rendering pipeline
Add a matching legend entry in `StatusLegend`
Provide full unit-test coverage of the detection algorithm
non_goals: Changing click behaviour or modal content for gap cells
Dynamic configuration of the gap threshold at runtime
constraints: Must use DS primitives (Cluster, Inline, Stack) for any new UI; no raw flex divs
Tests must be written but NOT run locally (CI only per testing policy)
assumptions: The grid date window is always finite (user-selected start/end)
`packBookingsIntoRows` already handles per-row period packing; gap detection runs after packing
key_entry_points: `apps/reception/src/app/rooms-grid/page.tsx` → lazy-imports `RoomsGridClient` (no SSR); entry point for the rooms-grid page
`apps/reception/src/components/roomgrid/RoomsGrid.tsx` → calls `useGridData(startDate, endDate)`, iterates `knownRooms`, passes per-room data to `<RoomGrid />`
`apps/reception/src/components/roomgrid/RoomGrid.tsx` → passes `data` (array of `GridReservationRow`) to `<ReservationGrid>` with a `theme` mapping status → colour

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: [Type contract gap Minor]: adding `"gap"` to union without simultaneous `statusColors` update causes compile error — resolved by atomic task

rehearsal_issues.Scope Area: Period injection: synthetic gap periods must satisfy `TBookingPeriod` shape
rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: [Missing data dependency Moderate]: `TBookingPeriod` requires `bookingRef`, `occupantId`, `firstName`, `lastName`, `info`, `color` — gap pseudo-periods need placeholder values

rehearsal_issues.Scope Area: Downstream loop interference: arrivals/departures in RoomsGrid
rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: [Integration boundary Minor]: arrival/departure loops iterate `.periods` without status guard — gap periods could produce false movements
Not fully confirmed — needs read of OccupancyStrip.tsx
rehearsal_issues.Resolution Required: No (low risk; guard pattern is consistent)

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: No existing tests — new test file required
